content: DateRangePicker in Material3 Compose: use rememberDateRangePickerState(), wrap in DatePickerDialog with confirmButton and dismissButton. Access via state.selectedStartDateMillis and state.selectedEndDateMillis (both Long?). These are experimental APIs. Place DateRangePicker inside DatePickerDialog (not ModalBottomSheet) for correct layout. Modified end-date from null became mandatory to pass in a recent update. Confirm button should guard against null start/end dates.
